popularStory.headline: Sir David Lindsay
popularStory.description:
Biography
Parents and Early Life
Sir David Lindsay was the eldest son of Sir Alexander Lindsay. The name of his mother is unknown, but she is believed to have been a sister of James, Steward of Scotla …

zh.lifeSummary: 當David Lindsay Lord of Crawford於1299年出生在美國德州麥可藍南克勞福德時，他的父親Sir Alexander de Lindsay of Crawford33歲，母親Alice Stewart31歲。他於大約1324年11月28日與Mary de Abernethy在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾克勞福德結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1355年10月13日在他的家鄉享年56歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭。

nameMeanings.name: Lindsay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Lindsey in Lincolnshire, England. This is first found in the form Lindissi, apparently a derivative of the British name of Lincoln . To this was later added the Old English element ēg ‘island’, since the place was virtually cut off by the surrounding fenland. The surname was taken to Scotland at an early date and is the name of an important and powerful Scottish family.
Irish: adopted as an equivalent ofvarious Gaelic names (see   Lindsey  ).

variants.name: Linzy
meanings: Altered form of Scottish, Irish, or English   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  . Compare   Lenzy  .

variants.name: Linzey
meanings: English: variant of   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  .

variants.name: Lindsey
meanings: Irish: shortened and Anglicized form of various Gaelic surnames, as for example Ó Loingsigh (see Lynch 1), Mac Giolla Fhionntóg (see McClintock ), and Ó Fhloinn (see Flynn and Lynn ).

variants.name: Lincoln
meanings: English: habitational name from the city of Lincoln, so named from an original British name Lindo- ‘lake’ + Latin colonia ‘settlement, colony’. The place was an important administrative center during the Roman occupation of Britain and in the Middle Ages it was a center for the manufacture of cloth, including the famous ‘Lincoln green’.
African American: adoption of the surname in 1 above, in honor of Abraham Lincoln, the 16th president of the US, who abolished slavery.
History: Abraham Lincoln (1809–65), 16th president of the US, was the son of an illiterate laborer, descended from Samuel Lincoln, who had emigrated from England to MA in 1637.

variants.name: Linsey
meanings: Scottish, Irish, or English: variant of   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  .
Americanized form of German Linse or Swiss German Linsi, see Lins .

nameMeanings.name: David
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the greatest of all the kings of Israel, whose history is recounted with great vividness in the first and second books of Samuel and elsewhere. As a boy he killed the giant Philistine Goliath with his slingshot. As king of Judah, and later of all Israel, he expanded the power of the Israelites and established the security of their kingdom. He was also noted as a poet, many of the Psalms being attributed to him. The Hebrew derivation of the name is uncertain; it is said by some to represent a nursery word meaning ‘darling’. It is a very popular Jewish name, but is almost equally common among Gentiles in the English-speaking world. It is particularly common in Wales and Scotland, having been borne by the patron saint of Wales (  see  Dewi   ) and by two medieval kings of Scotland.

en.lifeSummary: When David Lindsay Lord of Crawford was born in 1299, in Crawford, McLennan, Texas, United States, his father, Sir Alexander de Lindsay of Crawford, was 33 and his mother, Alice Stewart, was 31. He married Mary de Abernethy about 28 November 1324, in Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 13 October 1355, in his hometown, at the age of 56, and was buried in Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque David Lindsay Lord of Crawford est né en 1299, à Crawford, McLennan, Texas, États-Unis, son père, Sir Alexander de Lindsay of Crawford, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Alice Stewart, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Mary de Abernethy environ 28 novembre 1324, à Crawford, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 13 octobre 1355, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als David Lindsay Lord of Crawford 1299 in Crawford, McLennan, Texas, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Alexander de Lindsay of Crawford 33 und seine Mutter Alice Stewart 31. Er hat um 28. November 1324 in Crawford, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Mary de Abernethy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 13. Oktober 1355 im Alter von 56 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando David Lindsay Lord of Crawford è nato il nel 1299 nel Crawford, McLennan, Texas, Stati Uniti d'America, il suo padre, Sir Alexander de Lindsay of Crawford, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Alice Stewart, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Mary de Abernethy circa 28 novembre 1324, nel Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 13 ottobre 1355, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: David Lindsay Lord of Crawfordが1299年にアメリカ合衆国テキサス州マクレナンクラウフォードで生まれた時，父Sir Alexander de Lindsay of Crawfordは33歳，母Alice Stewartは31歳であった。約1324年11月28日にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアクラウフォードでMary de Abernethyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1355年10月13日に故郷で56歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: David Lindsay Lord of Crawford(이)가 1299년 미국 텍사스 주 맥렌아 크롤퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Alexander de Lindsay of Crawford(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Stewart(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1324년 11월 28일 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 크롤퍼드에서 Mary de Abernethy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1355년 10월 13일 그의 고향에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando David Lindsay Lord of Crawford nasceu em 1299, em Crawford, McLennan, Texas, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Sir Alexander de Lindsay of Crawford, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Alice Stewart, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary de Abernethy aproximadamente 28 de novembro de 1324, em Crawford, Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 13 de outubro de 1355, em sua cidade natal, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Escócia, United Kingdom.

ro.Crawford, ML12 6TX: Crawford, McLennan, Texas, Statele Unite ale Americii

ru.lifeSummary: Когда David Lindsay Lord of Crawford родился в 1299 г. в местности кравфорд, макленнан, Техас, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени Sir Alexander de Lindsay of Crawford было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Stewart, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary de Abernethy около 28 ноября 1324 г. в местности кравфорд, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 13 октября 1355 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando David Lindsay Lord of Crawford nació en 1299, en Crawford, McLennan, Texas, Estados Unidos, su papá, Sir Alexander de Lindsay of Crawford, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Alice Stewart, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Mary de Abernethy aproximadamente 28 de noviembre de 1324, en Crawford, Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 13 de octubre de 1355, en su pueblo, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Escocia, Reino Unido.
